sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 5. Market Risk Templates
sections.description: Instructions for reporting market risk templates.

sections.description: Template for reporting position risks on traded debt instruments.

sections.description: Overview of the MKR SSA TDI template.

sections.heading: 5.1.2. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Detailed instructions for filling out the MKR SSA TDI template.

sections.description: Detailed instructions for filling out the MKR SSA SEC template.

sections.description: Overview of the MKR SSA EQU template.

sections.description: Overview of the MKR SSA FX template.

C 18.01.name: Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Position Risks in Traded Debt Instruments (MKR SSA TDI)
C 18.01.description: Reports position risks on traded debt instruments under the Standardised Approach.
C 18.01.section_heading: 5.1. C 18.01 – Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Position Risks in Traded Debt Instruments (MKR SSA TDI)

C 19.01.name: Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for specific risk in securitisations (MKR SSA SEC)
C 19.01.description: Reports specific risk in securitisations held in the trading book.
C 19.01.section_heading: 5.2. C 19.01 – Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for specific risk in securitisations (MKR SSA SEC)

C 20.01.name: Market risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Specific risk for positions assigned to the correlation trading portfolio (MKR SSA CTP)
C 20.01.description: Reports specific risk for positions in the correlation trading portfolio.
C 20.01.section_heading: 5.3. C 20.01 – Market risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Specific risk for positions assigned to the correlation trading portfolio (MKR SSA CTP)

C 21.01.name: Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Position Risk in Equities (MKR SSA EQU)
C 21.01.description: Reports position risk in equities held in the trading book.
C 21.01.section_heading: 5.4. C 21.01 - Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Position Risk in Equities (MKR SSA EQU)

C 22.01.name: Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Foreign Exchange Risk (MKR SSA FX)
C 22.01.description: Reports positions and own funds requirements for foreign exchange risk.
C 22.01.section_heading: 5.5. C 22.01 - Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Foreign Exchange Risk (MKR SSA FX)

C 23.01.name: Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Commodities risk (MKR SSA COM)
C 23.01.description: Reports positions and own funds requirements for commodities risk.
C 23.01.section_heading: 5.6. C 23.01 - Market Risk: Simplified Standardised Approach for Commodities risk (MKR SSA COM)

C 24.00.name: Market Risk Internal Model (MKR IM)
C 24.00.description: Reports VaR and stressed VaR figures for different market risks.
C 24.00.section_heading: 5.7. C 24.00 - Market Risk Internal Model (MKR IM)
